modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need confirmation that Exam4 receiver is ready for final exams.

full_description_text: 
Hola, I’m just checking if the Exam4 receiver is all set up for our final exams. I want to make sure everything is good to go when we start. It’s really important for us to have this ready, so I hope to hear back soon!
short_description: Need confirmation that Exam4 receiver is ready for final exams.
description: Hola, I’m just checking if the Exam4 receiver is all set up for our final exams. I want to make sure everything is good to go when we start. It’s really important for us to have this ready, so I hope to hear back soon!
